prompt: Create a realistic high-key portrait photograph of a young adult woman with long chestnut-brown hair, straight silky hair parted near the center with fine flyaway strands catching the light. She is seated indoors beside a large bright window on a sunny day, turned slightly three-quarters toward the camera with bare shoulders visible, wearing a delicate cream white ribbed camisole with thin straps and subtle lace trim. The composition is a close vertical half-body portrait from head to upper torso, with her face intentionally covered by a centered opaque square privacy block in a muted warm brown/taupe color, hiding all facial features while leaving the hair, neck, shoulders, and outfit visible. Use soft natural daylight, airy overexposed window light, shallow depth of field, blurred urban greenery and pale building shapes outside the window, gentle skin tones, realistic hair texture, clean lifestyle photography mood, 85mm lens look, soft bokeh, minimal background clutter, intimate calm atmosphere, photorealistic detail, portrait orientation.
